title: Fintech CTO slams Anthropic over mass Claude suspensions, warns developers ‘never put all your eggs in one basket’
summary: Anthropic suspended over 60 Claude AI accounts for Belo, a fintech startup. Belo CTO Pato Molina criticized the lack of explanation from the company, and said there was only a Google form for an appeal process. After over 15 hours, Anthropic restored access, citing a false positive.
